title: Crypto Biz: Is the AI-to-crypto rotation underway?
summary: Crypto Biz: Is the AI-to-crypto rotation underway?
briefing: Bitcoin ETF inflows, cooling AI momentum and potential regulatory progress under the CLARITY Act are fueling speculation that capital is rotating back into crypto.

title: World Foundation raises $52.5M in Pantera-led funding to expand World ID infrastructure
summary: World Foundation raises $52.5M in Pantera-led funding to expand World ID infrastructure
briefing: The organization sold locked WLD tokens to strategic investors as it seeks to grow its biometric identity network amid rising demand for human verification online.

title: Bitcoin falls under $64K as surging US bond yields boost Fed rate-hike odds
summary: Bitcoin falls under $64K as surging US bond yields boost Fed rate-hike odds
briefing: Bitcoin saw several dips under the $64,000 mark as a Binance “plunge protection team” reemerged with bid liquidity to avoid a deeper BTC price rout.

title: A quantum roadmap would push Bitcoin much higher: Charles Edwards
summary: A quantum roadmap would push Bitcoin much higher: Charles Edwards
briefing: A Bitcoin development roadmap that addresses quantum computing risks could see the price surge by “double digits” very quickly, according to Charles Edwards.

title: Thailand SEC files complaint against Bitkub over alleged false disclosures
summary: Thailand SEC files complaint against Bitkub over alleged false disclosures
briefing: Thailand’s SEC filed a criminal complaint against Bitkub and two former directors over alleged false disclosures linked to a 2021 cyberattack involving $50 million in assets.

title: Odos Protocol to shut down, gives users until July 30 to withdraw assets
summary: Odos Protocol to shut down, gives users until July 30 to withdraw assets
briefing: Odos Protocol will shut down on July 30, giving users one week to withdraw assets. The team did not provide a reason for the decision.

title: RWAs become Hyperliquid’s largest trading category
summary: RWAs become Hyperliquid’s largest trading category
briefing: Tokenized RWA trading became Hyperliquid’s largest trading category for the first time, accounting for more than half of the decentralized exchange’s weekly trading volume.

title: Brazil puts tokenized cows to work as loan collateral: Report
summary: Brazil puts tokenized cows to work as loan collateral: Report
briefing: Ten tokenized dairy cows backed a $19,600 loan registered on Brazil’s B3, in one of Brazil’s first uses of tokenized livestock as loan collateral.

title: World Foundation Raises $52.5M to Scale Sam Altman’s ‘Proof of Human’ ID
summary: World Foundation Raises $52.5M to Scale Sam Altman’s ‘Proof of Human’ ID
briefing: Pantera Capital led the one-year locked token sale, joined by Bain Capital Crypto, as World scales its ID network for AI agents.

title: EU Names Justin Sun's HTX in Russia Sanctions, Two Months After UK
summary: EU Names Justin Sun's HTX in Russia Sanctions, Two Months After UK
briefing: The 21st package stops short of a full asset freeze for HTX, which it accused of "significantly frustrating" its Russia measures.

title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin's New $15M Quantum Defense Fund
summary: Morning Minute: Bitcoin's New $15M Quantum Defense Fund
briefing: Plus, the Clarity Act is no longer expected to progress before the August recess. And Vlad Tenev's X was hacked to post a meme coin...

title: India Orders GitHub to Take Down Jack Dorsey's Bitchat Amid Protests
summary: India Orders GitHub to Take Down Jack Dorsey's Bitchat Amid Protests
briefing: The order gave GitHub three hours to pull three code repositories, citing the messaging app's use during protest internet shutdowns.

title: Polymarket Account in Farage Backer's Name Took $9M in Crypto From Unknown Sources: FT
summary: Polymarket Account in Farage Backer's Name Took $9M in Crypto From Unknown Sources: FT
briefing: The "GCottrell93" account bet the funds on Trump's election win and cashed out the profit, though who paid in and who collected is unclear.

title: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
summary: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
briefing: FLUX 3 is the German AI lab’s first video model, and the same system is already teaching robots to work an Audi assembly line.

title: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
summary: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
briefing: Solomon's endorsement splits with JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon and banking trade groups, who warn the bill's stablecoin-yield provisions could pull deposits away from traditional lenders.

title: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
summary: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
briefing: A Shanghai-based insurance-tech company trading below $1 wants to build a bitcoin treasury by taking BTC directly as payment for new shares.
